title: Educative Student Developer Pack Offer
description: Discover the best learning environment to learn and retain concepts effortlessly. Experience instant coding with browser-based Playgrounds, engage with interactive hands-on labs, and follow guided tutorials for seamless mastery.
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
